channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Announcing RPI Reads: A Summer Reading Initiative
item.description: RPI Libraries is excited to launch RPI Reads, a summer reading initiative for the entire RPI community! Register to participate and log any reading you complete this summer—whether for academic work or pure enjoyment. Every entry counts, and participants will be entered into a raffle for prizes. You can take part from anywhere, either in person or virtually. Visit the Folsom Library Service Desk or the RPI Reads website for full details and to get started!
item.author: Community

item.title: Memorial Day Weekend Dining Hours
item.description: Dining and Retail Hours of Operations will vary for the upcoming Memorial Day Weekend Holiday. Please click the link above for all the details. Thank you and enjoy your Memorial Day Weekend!
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI LGTBQ+ Taskforce & EMPAC Pride Celebration!
item.description: Get ready to celebrate love, identity, and community—we’re thrilled to invite you to our Pride Preparation Party on Friday, May 29th and to march with us in the Capital Pride Parade on Sunday, June 14th! Please fill out this form and share if you plan to join!
item.author: Community

item.title: Make the Most of Your CDPHP Fitness Reimbursement – Capital Region Basketball Camp at RPI
item.description:
Registration is open for The Capital Region Basketball Camp for youth at RPI, led by Mark Gilbride, Head Men’s Basketball Coach. CDPHP members can submit a fitness reimbursement request via their member account online.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
